articles.title: Accelerate protein design with BoltzGen on Amazon SageMaker AI
articles.snippet: In this post, we demonstrate how to deploy BoltzGen on SageMaker AI and run an end-to-end protein design experiment. The setup offers two execution modes for different stages of research and uses step-level caching to reduce compute expenses during iterative workflows.
